I live in a more rural area that has moved into our highest risk tier for Covid. 
They just seem to be making all the wrong choices amongst our local schools and other agencies.

turn_info.content: The middle school is still in person 100% of the time. There have been >30 cases, most in the last 3 weeks, and they keep sending letters home stating that they don't believe the kids are getting sick in school. It's infuriating.
